creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@getmail.no
text:
The port installs the wrapper script for srec_info instead of the actual program, resulting in this:
tingo@kg-core1$  srec_info
/usr/local/bin/srec_info: error: `/usr/local/bin/.libs/srec_info' does not exist
This script is just a wrapper for srec_info.
See the libtool documentation for more information.
the first few lines of the script reads:
# bin/srec_info - temporary wrapper script for .libs/srec_info
# Generated by libtool (GNU libtool) 2.4.2
#
# The bin/srec_info program cannot be directly executed until all the libtool
# libraries that it depends on are installed.
#
# This wrapper script should never be moved out of the build directory.
# If it is, it will not operate correctly.

Fix: 

none known at this time.
How-To-Repeat: 

1. install devel/srecord
2. execute /usr/local/bin/srec_info
